title: Light Outline
description: Adds a light outline to everything in the world!
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60974ddbaf0609ed11d52f6b78e507b94e8b9774.png)
### Light Outline
🌏This resource pack is designed specifically for the **26.1 Tiny Takeover** update to make your world look sharper and more defined without adding unnecessary clutter.

### What this pack does for you:
- **Soft Block Outlines**: It adds a subtle, elegant highlight to the edges of **every block**. This helps you better see the shape of your buildings and the terrain. Blocks will no longer "blend together" into a flat mass, making the world's geometry pop.

- **Shader-like Visuals**: You get the look of professional shaders (like BSL) directly in vanilla Minecraft. It gives the game a deeper, more "premium" feel while staying true to the classic style.

- **Smart Proximity Scaling**: Unlike older or simpler outline packs, this one is "smart." It won't fill your screen with solid white color when you walk right up to a wall. The edges stay thin and clean no matter how close you are.
